text_excerpt: Volunteer for Labour - Maria Eagle MP Skip to main content Maria Eagle MP A Strong Voice in Tough Times Join Get Involved Donate Home About Contact Maria Volunteer for Labour Volunteering Campaign Events Newsletter More Menu Volunteer for Labour The Labour Party needs your help to campaign for a Labour Government and for our hard working local councillors. If you’re interested in getting involved by delivering leaflets, talking to residents on the door step or attending a phone bank please complete the form below. On the Campaign Trail How can you help? What can you do? I can deliver leaflets in my area I can help with door knocking I can attend phone banks Name * Phone Number * Postcode * When is a good time to call you? * Follow me on Facebook and Twitter Maria Eagle MP Contact details Unit House, Speke Boulevard, Liverpool, L24 9HZ View on Google Maps Email: Maria.Eagle.MP@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Lynnie Hinnigan on behalf of Maria Eagle both at Unit House, Speke Boulevard, Liverpool, L24 9HZ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
